commands.review_summary:
The branch hides MCP tools from generic code-mode `ALL_TOOLS`/`tools.*`, adds typed `MCP.$api()` and server `$api()` object-input discovery, auto-drains namespace bridge calls, and updates docs, tests, QA proof tooling, and one UI test.

PR surface: Source +526, Tests +99, Docs +48, Other +358. Total +1031 across 8 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a feature/API-shaping PR rather than a bug report. The PR body does provide a concrete local Gateway proof path for the changed behavior using a QA provider and stdio MCP fixture.

target.title: feat: add typed MCP code-mode API
target.body:
## Summary
- Hide MCP tools from code-mode guest `ALL_TOOLS`, `tools.search`, `tools.describe`, and `tools.call`; MCP remains available only through the `MCP` namespace.
- Add TypeScript-like `$api()` headers for `MCP.$api()` and `MCP.<server>.$api(toolName?, { schema: true })`, with object-only MCP input mapping.
- Auto-drain ready namespace bridge calls under one exec/wait deadline, with suspended-run capacity reserved before dispatch so slow calls can still be snapshotted safely.
- Add a repeatable Gateway/MCP code-mode proof script and repair the current Control UI browser-redactor alias CI break from `main` so the PR merge ref is green.

## Verification
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check src/agents/code-mode.ts src/agents/code-mode-namespaces.ts src/agents/tool-search.ts src/agents/code-mode.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/providers/mock-openai/server.ts scripts/mcp-code-mode-gateway-e2e.ts docs/reference/code-mode.md`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/agents/code-mode.ts src/agents/code-mode-namespaces.ts src/agents/tool-search.ts src/agents/code-mode.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/providers/mock-openai/server.ts scripts/mcp-code-mode-gateway-e2e.ts`
- `pnpm check:test-types`
- `pnpm deadcode:dependencies`
- `pnpm deadcode:unused-files`
- `pnpm deadcode:report:ci:ts-unused`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/code-mode.test.ts src/agents/agent-bundle-mcp-tools.materialize.test.ts -- --reporter=dot` (rerun passed after one timeout-string flake on `terminates hostile infinite loops outside the main event loop`)
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/control-ui-vite-config.node.test.ts ui/src/ui/browser-redact.test.ts -- --reporter=dot`
- `OPENCLAW_MCP_CODE_MODE_GATEWAY_E2E_KEEP=1 OPENCLAW_ALLOW_SLOW_REPLY_TESTS=1 node --import tsx scripts/mcp-code-mode-gateway-e2e.ts`
- `pnpm build`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main` clean after fixups.

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: MCP tools in code mode are discoverable and callable only via the typed MCP namespace API, not generic `tools.*`.

Real environment tested: local Gateway with code mode enabled, QA mock OpenAI provider, and a temp read-only stdio MCP fixture server.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `OPENCLAW_MCP_CODE_MODE_GATEWAY_E2E_KEEP=1 OPENCLAW_ALLOW_SLOW_REPLY_TESTS=1 node --import tsx scripts/mcp-code-mode-gateway-e2e.ts`

Evidence after fix: `providerRequestCount=2`; `providerDeclaredToolCount=2`; `plannedTools=["exec"]`; `resultText=fixture-note-alpha`; `searchCount=0`; `callCount=1`; session log captured `MCP.$api`, `MCP.fixture`, and `fixture__lookup_note` with `toolSearchPollution=0`.

Observed result after fix: `MCP_CODE_MODE_OK unclear=none improvement=virtual-header-files-would-avoid-the-first-api-call`.

What was not tested: real remote third-party MCP servers; proof used a local stdio fixture plus the existing MCP materialization path.

## Follow-up Notes
- The live agent did not report unclear API behavior after reading `$api()` output.
- The best next refinement is exposing these TypeScript-like headers as virtual ambient files so the first `$api()` call can disappear.
- The same shape should apply to internal namespaces such as cron: one stable namespace, object input, generated comments/types from schema, and no extra model-visible catalog pollution.
target.author: steipete
